name: Baked Parsnips Irish Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the parsnips, then quarter them and remove any woody core.
2. Parboil for 15 minutes.
3. Place in an ovenproof dish. Add stock and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Bake for 30 minutes on a low shelf in a moderate oven. (Generally, parsnips are baked in the same oven as the main meat dish, whose cooking temperature governs that of the parnsips.)
